title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw in Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños to Accept the Deed of Donation Being Made by the Trimotors Technology Corporation on Behalf of Jesus V. Del Rosario Inc., Represented by Its Chairman and President, Mr. Jaime C. Del Rosario for Five (5) Units of Bajaj Re Three Wheeled Vehicle. (AUTHOR: HON. MARLO PJ A. ALIPON,REE,RMP,MPA, 03/15/2021)
